name: Enterprise Data Pipeline — Meghraj Nikalje v2.0

nodes.name: ⏰ Weekly Schedule (Mon 9AM)
nodes.notes: Fires every Monday at 09:00 AM IST. Can also be triggered manually.

nodes.name: 🌐 Fetch Data from API
nodes.notes: Fetches data from API with automatic retry on failure (3 attempts, 2s delay).

nodes.name: 📤 Split for Parallel Processing
nodes.notes: Splits cleaned data into batches of 10 for downstream parallel processing.

nodes.name: 📊 Write KPIs → Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends one summary row per pipeline run for audit trail and trend analysis.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json; const kpis = d.kpis; const rows = d.cleaned_data.slice(0, 15).map(r => ` #${r.id} ${r.title.substring(0,45)}... ${r.word_count} ${r.user_tier.toUpperCase()} ` ).join(''); const tierBreakdown = Object.entries(kpis.by_user_tier || {}) .map(([k,v]) => `
  • ${k}: ${v} records
    • `).join(''); const html = `

    📊 Weekly Pipeline Report

    Run ID: ${d.run_id}  |  ${new Date(d.triggered_at).toDateString()}

    ${[['Total Records',kpis.total_records,'#1A56A0'],['Unique Users',kpis.unique_users,'#27AE60'],['Avg Word Count',kpis.avg_word_count,'#8E44AD'],['Pass Rate',d.validation.pass_rate,'#E67E22']].map(([label,val,color]) => `
    ${val}
    ${label}
    ` ).join('')}

    User Tier Breakdown

      ${tierBreakdown}

    Top 15 Records (Preview)

    ${rows}
    ID Title Words Tier
    Auto-generated by n8n Enterprise Pipeline v2.0  |  Meghraj Nikalje
    `; return [{ json: { ...d, html_report: html, email_subject: `Weekly Data Report — ${new Date(d.triggered_at).toDateString()} | ${kpis.total_records} records` } }];

nodes.name: 💬 Slack — Success Notification

parameters.text:
✅ *Weekly Pipeline Completed*
>Run ID: `{{ $json.run_id }}`
>Records: *{{ $json.kpis.total_records }}* processed | Pass rate: *{{ $json.validation.pass_rate }}*
>Report emailed to stakeholders.

nodes.notes: Sends a success message to Slack #data-pipeline-alerts channel.
